marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 瑞典

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (瑞典). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.74 / 平局 3.10 / 客胜 4.30；去水支持率约 主胜 51% / 平局 29% / 客胜 21%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.74 / 3.10 / 4.30; normalized support is about home 51% / draw 29% / away 21%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 13 个百分点，市场分歧约 22 个百分点，让球同向支持约 25%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 13 points, market disagreement about 22 points, same-side handicap support about 25%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率偏高，胜平负方向需要防平。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is high, so cover the draw risk. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.54，大 2.5 概率约 47%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.54, over 2.5 probability about 47%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 53%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 53%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 47%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 47%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 瑞典

explanation.zh: 这场有正路倾向，但不适合硬写成稳胆。让球同向支持约 25%，风险标签为 价值边际不足、EV不足、防平、让球支持不足、进球临界、盘口分歧，先按观察单处理。
explanation.en: There is a favorite lean, but not a banker. same-side handicap support is about 25%; risk tags: No value edge, Flat expected value, Draw risk, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. Keep it in watch mode.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：主胜 瑞典对应 让球同向支持约 25%；让球盘去水支持约 主胜 25% / 平 27% / 客胜 48%，和普通胜平负主线存在温差。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: Home Win (瑞典) has same-side handicap support is about 25%; handicap normalized support is home 25% / draw 27% / away 48%, not fully aligned with HAD.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.54，大 2.5 约 47%，双方进球约 51%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.54, over 2.5 about 47%, BTTS about 51%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、防平、让球支持不足、进球临界、盘口分歧。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, Draw risk, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline, Market disagreement. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 让球客胜 佛得角
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Handicap Away Win (佛得角)

explanation.zh: 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(-2.00)条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Handicap Away Win (佛得角). This HHAD market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(-2.00) SP：让球主胜 1.82 / 让球平 4.00 / 让球客胜 3.03；去水支持率约 主胜 49% / 平局 22% / 客胜 29%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HHAD (-2.00) SP: 1.82 / 4.00 / 3.03; normalized support is about home 49% / draw 22% / away 29%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：普通胜平负未开售，本场按独立 Poisson 让球概率给参考方向；模型优势约 36 个百分点，盘口仅作校验，条件未完全闭合时不强推单一让球方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: standard 1X2 is not open, so the reference direction comes from independent Poisson handicap probabilities. Model edge is about 36 points; the board is only a validation layer.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(-2.00) SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HHAD (-2.00) SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 大2.5球（≥3球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.81，大 2.5 概率约 53%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.81, over 2.5 probability about 53%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 大2.5球（≥3球） 的模型概率约 53%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Over 2.5 goals is about 53%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 53%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 53%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 让球客胜 佛得角
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Handicap Away Win (佛得角)

explanation.zh: 让球客胜 佛得角只能作为参考，不是主推结论：模型差距约 36 个百分点，真正的问题在让球盘是否愿意继续同向。
explanation.en: Handicap Away Win (佛得角) is a reference only, not the main pick: model edge is 36 points, and the key question is handicap confirmation.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：让球客胜 佛得角对应 让球同向支持约 29%；让球盘去水支持约 主胜 49% / 平 22% / 客胜 29%，和普通胜平负主线存在温差。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: Handicap Away Win (佛得角) has same-side handicap support is about 29%; handicap normalized support is home 49% / draw 22% / away 29%, not fully aligned with HAD.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.81，大 2.5 约 53%，双方进球约 47%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.81, over 2.5 about 53%, BTTS about 47%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

updateReason.en: Pre-match odds or handicap signals changed materially, so a new late forecast was generated and will be locked after kickoff.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 比利时

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (比利时). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.46 / 平局 3.65 / 客胜 5.85；去水支持率约 主胜 61% / 平局 24% / 客胜 15%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.46 / 3.65 / 5.85; normalized support is about home 61% / draw 24% / away 15%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 24 个百分点，市场分歧约 36 个百分点，让球同向支持约 33%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 24 points, market disagreement about 36 points, same-side handicap support about 33%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.70，大 2.5 概率约 51%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.70, over 2.5 probability about 51%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 49%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 49%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 51%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 51%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 比利时

explanation.zh: 这场有正路倾向，但不适合硬写成稳胆。让球同向支持约 33%，风险标签为 价值边际不足、EV不足、让球支持不足、进球临界，先按观察单处理。
explanation.en: There is a favorite lean, but not a banker. same-side handicap support is about 33%; risk tags: No value edge, Flat expected value, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. Keep it in watch mode.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：独立模型首选优势约 24 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场差距约 36 个百分点，仅作为校验。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: independent model edge is about 24 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market gap is about 36 points and is validation only.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.70，大 2.5 约 51%，双方进球约 49%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.70, over 2.5 about 51%, BTTS about 49%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 客胜 乌拉圭

explanation.en: Reference lean: Away Win (乌拉圭). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 8.45 / 4.35 / 1.28; normalized support is about home 10% / draw 20% / away 69%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 10 个百分点，市场分歧约 49 个百分点，让球同向支持约 43%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。

explanation.zh: 模型没有否定客胜 乌拉圭，只是拒绝把它抬到主推：市场第一方向领先 49 个百分点，但让球验证和风险项还没闭合。
explanation.en: The model is not rejecting Away Win (乌拉圭); it is refusing to upgrade it. Market lead is 49 points, but handicap and risk checks are not closed.

Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 伊朗

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (伊朗). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.56 / 平局 3.30 / 客胜 5.40；去水支持率约 主胜 57% / 平局 27% / 客胜 16%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.56 / 3.30 / 5.40; normalized support is about home 57% / draw 27% / away 16%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 16 个百分点，市场分歧约 30 个百分点，让球同向支持约 29%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 16 points, market disagreement about 30 points, same-side handicap support about 29%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.37，大 2.5 概率约 44%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.37, over 2.5 probability about 44%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：1-0 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 56%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 1-0; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 56%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 44%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 44%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 伊朗

explanation.zh: 模型没有否定主胜 伊朗，只是拒绝把它抬到主推：市场第一方向领先 30 个百分点，但让球验证和风险项还没闭合。
explanation.en: The model is not rejecting Home Win (伊朗); it is refusing to upgrade it. Market lead is 30 points, but handicap and risk checks are not closed.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：主胜 伊朗对应 让球同向支持约 29%；让球盘去水支持约 主胜 29% / 平 29% / 客胜 43%，和普通胜平负主线存在温差。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: Home Win (伊朗) has same-side handicap support is about 29%; handicap normalized support is home 29% / draw 29% / away 43%, not fully aligned with HAD.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 1-0，总期望 2.37，大 2.5 约 44%，双方进球约 46%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 1-0, total xG 2.37, over 2.5 about 44%, BTTS about 46%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 让球主胜 伊拉克
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Handicap Home Win (伊拉克)

explanation.zh: 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(+2.00)条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Handicap Home Win (伊拉克). This HHAD market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(+2.00) SP：让球主胜 2.03 / 让球平 3.89 / 让球客胜 2.64；去水支持率约 主胜 44% / 平局 23% / 客胜 34%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HHAD (+2.00) SP: 2.03 / 3.89 / 2.64; normalized support is about home 44% / draw 23% / away 34%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：普通胜平负未开售，本场按独立 Poisson 让球概率给参考方向；模型优势约 53 个百分点，盘口仅作校验，条件未完全闭合时不强推单一让球方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: standard 1X2 is not open, so the reference direction comes from independent Poisson handicap probabilities. Model edge is about 53 points; the board is only a validation layer.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 官方 HHAD 让球胜平负(+2.00) SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HHAD (+2.00) SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.67，大 2.5 概率约 50%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.67, over 2.5 probability about 50%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：1-2 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 50%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 1-2; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 50%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 50%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 50%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 让球主胜 伊拉克
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Handicap Home Win (伊拉克)

explanation.zh: 这场先不把让球主胜 伊拉克包装成高可信。HAD 方向虽然清楚，但让球同向支持约 44%，盘口确认不够完整。
explanation.en: This is not packaged as high confidence. Handicap Home Win (伊拉克) leads the HAD read, but same-side handicap support is about 44%, so confirmation is incomplete.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：风险标签叠加为 胜负接近、进球临界，当前不适合只给单一方向。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: risk tags overlap: Tight 1X2, Goal-model borderline. A single pick is not justified yet.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 1-2，总期望 2.67，大 2.5 约 50%，双方进球约 51%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 1-2, total xG 2.67, over 2.5 about 50%, BTTS about 51%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：胜负接近、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Tight 1X2, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 阿根廷

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (阿根廷). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.28 / 平局 4.25 / 客胜 8.90；去水支持率约 主胜 69% / 平局 21% / 客胜 10%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.28 / 4.25 / 8.90; normalized support is about home 69% / draw 21% / away 10%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 36 个百分点，市场分歧约 48 个百分点，让球同向支持约 43%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 36 points, market disagreement about 48 points, same-side handicap support about 43%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.65，大 2.5 概率约 49%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 51%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 51%, below the promotion threshold.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 阿根廷

explanation.zh: 主胜 阿根廷只能作为参考，不是主推结论：模型差距约 36 个百分点，真正的问题在让球盘是否愿意继续同向。
explanation.en: Home Win (阿根廷) is a reference only, not the main pick: model edge is 36 points, and the key question is handicap confirmation.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：独立模型首选优势约 36 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场差距约 48 个百分点，仅作为校验。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: independent model edge is about 36 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market gap is about 48 points and is validation only.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.65，大 2.5 约 49%，双方进球约 46%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.65, over 2.5 about 49%, BTTS about 46%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、国际赛低赔、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, International low-SP favorite, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 奥地利

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (奥地利). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.23 / 平局 4.90 / 客胜 8.90；去水支持率约 主胜 72% / 平局 18% / 客胜 10%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.23 / 4.90 / 8.90; normalized support is about home 72% / draw 18% / away 10%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 12 个百分点，市场分歧约 54 个百分点，让球同向支持约 48%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 12 points, market disagreement about 54 points, same-side handicap support about 48%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.70，大 2.5 概率约 50%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.70, over 2.5 probability about 50%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 50%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 50%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 50%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 50%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 奥地利

explanation.zh: 这场有正路倾向，但不适合硬写成稳胆。让球同向支持约 48%，风险标签为 价值边际不足、EV不足、热门过热、国际赛低赔、进球临界，先按观察单处理。
explanation.en: There is a favorite lean, but not a banker. same-side handicap support is about 48%; risk tags: No value edge, Flat expected value, Heavy favorite, International low-SP favorite, Goal-model borderline. Keep it in watch mode.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：独立模型首选优势约 12 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场差距约 54 个百分点，仅作为校验。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: independent model edge is about 12 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market gap is about 54 points and is validation only.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.70，大 2.5 约 50%，双方进球约 52%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.70, over 2.5 about 50%, BTTS about 52%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、热门过热、国际赛低赔、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, Heavy favorite, International low-SP favorite, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

fixture.note: Use only when official Sporttery/FIFA fixture data is unavailable.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 英格兰

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Home Win (英格兰). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 1.55 / 平局 3.40 / 客胜 5.25；去水支持率约 主胜 57% / 平局 26% / 客胜 17%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 1.55 / 3.40 / 5.25; normalized support is about home 57% / draw 26% / away 17%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 19 个百分点，市场分歧约 31 个百分点，让球同向支持约 30%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 19 points, market disagreement about 31 points, same-side handicap support about 30%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.56，大 2.5 概率约 48%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.56, over 2.5 probability about 48%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-1 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 52%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-1; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 52%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 48%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 48%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 主胜 英格兰

explanation.zh: 主胜 英格兰只能作为参考，不是主推结论：模型差距约 19 个百分点，真正的问题在让球盘是否愿意继续同向。
explanation.en: Home Win (英格兰) is a reference only, not the main pick: model edge is 19 points, and the key question is handicap confirmation.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：独立模型首选优势约 19 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场差距约 31 个百分点，仅作为校验。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: independent model edge is about 19 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market gap is about 31 points and is validation only.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-1，总期望 2.56，大 2.5 约 48%，双方进球约 49%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-1, total xG 2.56, over 2.5 about 48%, BTTS about 49%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、让球支持不足、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, Handicap support weak, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.zh: 已记录 681 次官方 SP 快照，胜平负主盘基本没动；这种场次不把静态赔率写成推荐，临场继续看让球盘是否补强。
summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.

basis.zh: 模型按竞彩日归档、按官方开赛时间排序；先用 Elo、长期历史样本、近一年状态、世界杯先验、赛程密度与 Poisson 比分分布生成独立足球预测。官方 SP/让球 SP 只用于市场校验、价值差比较和风险标签，不再驱动最终概率。
basis.en: Schedules are grouped by Sporttery day and sorted by official kickoff time. The model first builds an independent football forecast from Elo, long-run history, recent form, World Cup priors, and Poisson score distribution. Official SP/handicap SP are used only for market validation, value comparison, and risk tags; they do not drive the final probability.

policy.zh: 公式先算独立足球概率，官方 SP 只做市场校验和风险提示，权重固定为 0。
policy.en: The formula first computes independent football probabilities. Official SP is validation and risk context only, with weight fixed at 0.

formula.zh: lambda0 来自独立强度差和战平压力；lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg；lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda。
formula.en: lambda0 comes from independent strength edge and draw pressure; lambda_league=(1-wL)*lambda0+wL*leagueAvg; lambda_final=(1-wF)*lambda_league+wF*formLambda.

marketUse.zh: SP 不进入最终概率加权，只用于比较模型方向与市场是否偏离，并生成风险/价值提示。
marketUse.en: SP is not weighted into final probabilities; it only compares model direction against the market for risk/value notes.

calibration.zh: 当前为轻量级赛前校准：已加入历史 form 修正和近期命中率冷却；后续仍需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 正式校准。
calibration.en: This is a lightweight pre-match calibration with rolling-form correction and recent hit-rate cooldown; Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are still needed.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 客胜 哥伦比亚
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Away Win (哥伦比亚)

explanation.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负条件未齐：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为参考推荐。
explanation.en: Reference lean: Away Win (哥伦比亚). This 1X2 market did not pass the strong recommendation gate, so the direction is shown for user judgement only.

analysisItems.zh: 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP：主胜 9.00 / 平局 4.45 / 客胜 1.26；去水支持率约 主胜 10% / 平局 20% / 客胜 70%。
analysisItems.en: official Sporttery HAD SP: 9.00 / 4.45 / 1.26; normalized support is about home 10% / draw 20% / away 70%.

analysisItems.zh: 参考理由：独立模型优势约 19 个百分点，市场分歧约 50 个百分点，让球同向支持约 44%；条件没有同时闭合，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Watch reason: independent model edge is about 19 points, market disagreement about 50 points, same-side handicap support about 44%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 中国竞彩网官方 HAD 胜平负 SP 来自本次中国竞彩网同步快照。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. official Sporttery HAD SP came from this Sporttery sync snapshot.

tipLabel.zh: 进球参考 小2.5球（≤2球）

explanation.zh: 进球趋势条件未齐：总进球期望约 2.48，大 2.5 概率约 46%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.48, over 2.5 probability about 46%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：1-2 附近；候选方向 小2.5球（≤2球） 的模型概率约 54%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 1-2; candidate Under 2.5 goals is about 54%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 46%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。
analysisItems.en: Over 2.5 probability is about 46%. This is a model reference, not official Sporttery total-goals SP.

tipLabel.zh: 参考倾向 客胜 哥伦比亚
tipLabel.en: Reference lean: Away Win (哥伦比亚)

explanation.zh: 这场先不把客胜 哥伦比亚包装成高可信。HAD 方向虽然清楚，但让球同向支持约 44%，盘口确认不够完整。
explanation.en: This is not packaged as high confidence. Away Win (哥伦比亚) leads the HAD read, but same-side handicap support is about 44%, so confirmation is incomplete.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：独立模型首选优势约 19 个百分点，未达到强推荐阈值；市场差距约 50 个百分点，仅作为校验。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: independent model edge is about 19 points, below the strong-pick threshold; market gap is about 50 points and is validation only.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 1-2，总期望 2.48，大 2.5 约 46%，双方进球约 47%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 1-2, total xG 2.48, over 2.5 about 46%, BTTS about 47%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：价值边际不足、EV不足、国际赛低赔、进球临界。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按参考处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: No value edge, Flat expected value, International low-SP favorite, Goal-model borderline. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as reference-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 竞彩截止前，赛前分析先由 Elo 强度、长期历史样本、近一年状态、赛程密度、世界杯先验、比分分布与公开赛前信息层生成独立预测；官方 HAD/HHAD SP 和 SP 走势只用于校验市场分歧与价值风险。截止后保留历史预测，只结算赛果，不回写旧推荐。
dataPolicy.en: Before the Sporttery cutoff, pre-match reads first build an independent forecast from Elo strength, long-run history, recent form, schedule density, World Cup priors, score distribution, and public pre-match signals. Official HAD/HHAD SP and SP movement are used only to validate market disagreement and value risk. After cutoff, the historical prediction is kept and only settlement is added.

outputSections.zh: 六、伤停与首发阵容分析
七、战术风格与克制关系分析
八、赛程体能与战意分析
十、天气、场地与裁判因素
十二、综合判断与预测结论

zh: 先输出胜平负、比分分布、大小球、双方进球和让球概率，不把任务简化成只猜胜负。
独立概率先由 Elo 强度、Poisson 比分模型、近一年攻防、长期历史样本、世界杯先验和赛程密度生成；官方 SP 只作为市场校验和价值差参考。
推荐阈值跟随 model-calibration 动态变化；低命中联赛、市场或方向自动降权并提高概率差与让球支持要求。
回测必须按时间滚动，严禁赛后 xG、赛后射门、最终排名、未公开首发或时间点不一致的临场赔率泄漏。
评估以 log loss、Brier score、校准误差和分桶可靠性为主，命中率只作为辅助观察。
en: Output 1X2, score distribution, totals, BTTS, and handicap probabilities first instead of reducing the task to one winner.

Independent probabilities are generated first from Elo strength, Poisson score modelling, last-year attack/defense form, long-run history, World Cup priors, and schedule density; official SP is only market validation and value-gap reference.
Recommendation gates follow model-calibration dynamically; cold leagues, markets, or directions are down-weighted with higher probability-gap and handicap-support requirements.
Backtests must be time-ordered and must not leak post-match xG, post-match shots, final table rank, unpublished lineups, or late odds into earlier forecast nodes.
Evaluate with log loss, Brier score, calibration error, and bucket reliability; hit rate is only a secondary diagnostic.

forecastTargets.zh: 胜平负：主胜、平局、客胜三项概率
比分分布：2-3 个最高概率比分
大小球：大/小 2.5 概率
双方进球：BTTS Yes/No 概率
让球概率：当前官方让球线支持率
forecastTargets.en: Handicap: support at the current official line

modelingStack.zh: 独立基准：Elo、历史样本、世界杯先验与 Poisson 概率
modelingStack.en: Independent baseline: Elo, historical samples, World Cup priors, and Poisson probabilities

modelingStack.zh: Elo/Glicko 强度：球队动态评分、主场优势和强弱差
modelingStack.en: Elo/Glicko strength: dynamic rating, home advantage, team gap

modelingStack.zh: Poisson/Dixon-Coles：进球期望、比分矩阵、大小球和让球聚合
modelingStack.en: Poisson/Dixon-Coles: goal expectations, score matrix, totals, handicap aggregation

modelingStack.zh: 机器学习层：仅在基准稳定并完成时间滚动回测后加入
modelingStack.en: ML layer: added only after stable baselines and time-ordered backtests

modelingStack.zh: 集成层：用滚动验证集优化强度/Elo/Poisson/ML 权重
modelingStack.en: Ensemble: optimize strength/Elo/Poisson/ML weights on rolling validation

modelingStack.zh: 校准层：可靠性曲线、Platt、isotonic、联赛和场景分桶
modelingStack.en: Calibration: reliability curves, Platt, isotonic, league and profile buckets

zh: 必须输出概率，而不是只输出胜负结论。
必须按时间滚动回测，不能随机切分。
必须校准概率，并按联赛、场景和赔率区间分桶评估。
必须避免未来信息泄漏。
必须长期接近或优于简单赔率基准，否则不升格为推荐。
必须保留赛前快照，赛后只结算和复盘，不改写原方向。
en: Output probabilities, not just a winner.
Use time-ordered rolling backtests, not random splits.
Calibrate probabilities and evaluate by league, profile, and odds bucket.
Avoid future-information leakage.
Approach or beat the simple market baseline long term before promoting recommendations.
Keep pre-match snapshots; after kickoff only settle and review, never rewrite the original direction.

finalVerdict.zh: 结论必须区分稳妥方向和激进方向；胜平负与让球方向保持一致；数据不足时明确标注，不为推荐而硬推。
finalVerdict.en: The verdict must split conservative and aggressive directions; 1X2 and handicap views must stay consistent; missing data is labelled and no pick is forced.

updateReason.zh: 提示词与展示规则已升级，赛前方向未发生实质变化；保留原预测，只更新分析说明。
updateReason.en: Prompt and display rules were upgraded while the pre-match direction did not materially change; the old forecast is kept and only the analysis text is refreshed.

summary.en: 681 official SP snapshots recorded; the 1X2 board is essentially flat, so a static board is not packaged as a pick. Keep watching handicap confirmation.
